scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/api-book-handler.test.ts tests/auth-bridge.test.ts tests/client-error-reporting.test.ts tests/email-notify.test.ts tests/insert-programare.test.ts tests/normalize-booking-slug.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/signout-route.test.ts tests/slo-policy.test.ts tests/slots.test.ts tests/stripe-webhook.test.ts && vitest run tests/billing.test.ts --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:ci: node --import tsx --test tests/api-book-handler.test.ts tests/auth-bridge.test.ts tests/client-error-reporting.test.ts tests/email-notify.test.ts tests/insert-programare.test.ts tests/normalize-booking-slug.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/signout-route.test.ts tests/slo-policy.test.ts tests/slots.test.ts tests/stripe-webhook.test.ts && vitest run tests/billing.test.ts --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov node --import tsx --test tests/api-book-handler.test.ts tests/auth-bridge.test.ts tests/client-error-reporting.test.ts tests/email-notify.test.ts tests/insert-programare.test.ts tests/normalize-booking-slug.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/signout-route.test.ts tests/slo-policy.test.ts tests/slots.test.ts tests/stripe-webhook.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage:check: c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --check-coverage --lines 55 --functions 60 --branches 55 --statements 55 node --import tsx --test tests/api-book-handler.test.ts tests/auth-bridge.test.ts tests/client-error-reporting.test.ts tests/email-notify.test.ts tests/insert-programare.test.ts tests/normalize-booking-slug.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/signout-route.test.ts tests/slo-policy.test.ts tests/slots.test.ts tests/stripe-webhook.test.ts
scripts.check:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:ci && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm audit --audit-level critical
scripts.check:local: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:ci && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.check:full: pnpm run check:local && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:cf && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:cf && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm run build:cf && npx wrangler pages deploy .open-next
scripts.cf:secrets: wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY && wrangler secret put RESEND_FROM
scripts.deploy:safe: pnpm run verify:secrets && pnpm run verify:db && npx wrangler deploy
